title: Promises, Async Functions, and the Event Loop · Language Lens: Abort Timeout
summary: Coordinate status requests, deadlines, retries, and user cancellation without races or unhandled failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js abort timeout increment in a bounded asynchronous status coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Propagate AbortSignal, deadlines, and cleanup through every cancellable asynchronous boundary.
Choose all, allSettled, race, or any from failure, completion, and cancellation semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
